creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
On Wed, Jun 09, 1999 at 08:50:28AM +1000, Peter Jeremy wrote:

> The following appears to make it work.  It's not clear that this is
> the correct mechanism to handle ZIP files (it's done differently
> elsewhere).
<snip> 
>  USE_ZIP=	yes

Note that this makes the port fetch it with EXTRACT_SUFX=.zip.  Are you sure
that this actually fetches the distfile with .tar.gz?  It works here:
% make fetch
>> docbk31.zip doesn't seem to exist on this system.
>> Attempting to fetch from http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/docbook/3.1/.

and it's the same version as yours is:
% ident Makefile 
Makefile:
     $Id: Makefile,v 1.4 1999/05/05 17:40:24 nik Exp $

-- 
Chris Piazza    Abbotsford, BC, Canada
           cpiazza@home.net
finger norn@norn.ca.eu.org for PGP key
